brainstorming.scope: use its clarifying-question discipline; skip its spec-doc write/commit flow and approval gate because the orchestrator owns the gate; keep devforge's GitHub issue staleness and claim-ledger checks

writing-plans.scope: use its planning discipline: concrete files, test strategy, no placeholders; skip docs/plans file-save behavior and execution handoff

feature-dev.scope: implement only against the approved 2-design.md; skip feature-dev discovery, clarifying-question, and architecture phases; may dispatch devforge-code-explorer or devforge-code-architect for grounding only

staff-review.scope: apply to diff.patch; focus on correctness, edge cases, and test coverage

thermonuclear.scope: follow as instruction text, not as an invoked skill; apply maintainability standards to diff.patch: 1k-line file ceiling, no spaghetti branching, and code-judo simplification; map presumptive blockers to blocker or major

code-review.scope: keep the multi-agent and confidence-score method, but read iter-N/diff.patch plus the working tree instead of `gh pr diff`; skip PR eligibility checks and PR comments; report only findings with score >= 80
